name: Low Fat Seafood Stew
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb cod or other white-fleshed fish, firm fish cut into 1-inch cubes
2 1/2 cups canned tomatoes, chopped with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomatoes, garlic, onion, and seasoning in a saucepan. Simmer for 10 minutes.
2. Add cod and simmer gently for 2 minutes.
3. Add scallops and simmer for another 2 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and simmer for 3-5 minutes, until shrimp turns pink.
